The bead-specific changes are implemented and staged, but the required repo gate is not green from this worktree. `go test ./cmd` and `CGO_ENABLED=1 lefthook run pre-commit` both fail in the existing `cli/cmd` package before any metric-related regression can be committed. The failing checks are unrelated to the bead scope: `cli/cmd/installation_acceptance_test.go` has multiple pre-existing installation failures, and `cli/cmd/routinglint_test.go` fails on `agent_route_status.go:413`. Fixing those would require out-of-scope changes to unrelated command surfaces.

commit cfc88441 ("feat: add metric list/show and fix latest definition
resolution [ddx-70467059]"). I verified the bead-specific acceptance path with
the targeted metric command test and the internal metric package test, both of
which pass. The broader `go test ./cmd ./internal/metric ./internal/exec`
slice still fails on pre-existing installation acceptance tests unrelated to the
metric bead, so no additional code changes are warranted in this worktree.
